description: Overview of Solana's updates for the week of January 13-19, 2023, including developer ecosystem growth and proposal SIMD0005 regarding transaction execution responsibilities.
topic_summary: Discussion on Solana's developer ecosystem growth, reaching over 2000 developers in 2022, and the SIMD0005 proposal which changes transaction execution responsibilities from the leader to validators [t=28:74]. Highlights include RPC updates for non-vote transactions and improvements in the Explorer [t=156:88].
